title: Support - Verify that data is correct after moving between Accounts linked to different Tenants
scenario: Verify data correctness when switching between accounts linked to different tenants
steps: Log in with Account linked to Tenant A
Confirm Tenant A info is present
Log in with a different Account linked to Tenant B
Confirm Tenant B info is present
expected: Tenant A info is displayed when logged in with Account linked to Tenant A, and Tenant B info is displayed when logged in with Account linked to Tenant B.
